validation_gates.reason: Repository identity, permissions, default branch, current base, target blob, policy root, Directory Rules, ADR status, workflows, contracts, schemas, runtime, validator boundary, and CODEOWNERS were inspected.
All 33 lines of the prior policy/README.md stub were read and represented in the no-loss ledger.
The target remained blob 09cd966ab188d5e831960869117522a98274cb7f; no overlapping open policy-README PR surfaced; the existing review branch matched current main before mutation.
The existing canonical policy/ root README was updated in place. No parallel policy, schema, contract, fixture, receipt, proof, release, or public authority was created.

The first twelve H2 sections exactly match Purpose, Authority level, Status, What belongs here, What does NOT belong here, Inputs, Outputs, Validation, Review burden, Related folders, ADRs, and Last reviewed.

The README was reconciled to current main, nonempty Rego source, readiness-hold workflows, PolicyDecision shape fixtures, structural boundary tests, placeholder policy runtime, README-only bundle/validator lanes, and CODEOWNERS limits.
One H1 and twenty-one H2 sections were found; internal fragments resolve; the custom top anchor is unique; the file uses UTF-8, LF line endings, and a final newline.
Six static badges link to evidence-bearing sections. No dynamic CI, release, coverage, registry, or maturity badge was added.
The stable path, H1, purpose, singular-root posture, scope, exclusions, inputs, outputs, validation, review burden, related folders, and PROPOSED status were preserved and strengthened.
No private key, common credential/token pattern, protected payload, exact sensitive location, living-person record, or genomic record was introduced.
GitHub returned README blob fa9378a6a699d0985fd018dbdb9f27c15efcb1c3, matching the locally computed Git blob for the validated 26,418-byte file.
No accepted PolicyDecision was available to cite. This remains a draft review change with human review pending; this receipt is not policy approval or merge authorization.
Documentation/provenance-only change; no policy, schema, contract, fixture, validator, workflow, runtime, lifecycle, release, deployment, or public behavior changed.
Repository checks run after draft pull-request creation and were unavailable at receipt emission time.

notes: AI-authored documentation-only modernization on a scoped review branch. The policy root README is upgraded in place and reconciled to current repository evidence while preserving policy as admissibility authority and keeping evaluator, bundle, runtime, evidence, release, and publication claims bounded. Human review remains pending; no accepted PolicyDecision was consulted, and this receipt is process provenance rather than approval, release authority, or publication authority.
